description_long: This is a thick, dark-colored book with a hard cover, featuring ornate gold geometric and arcane designs on the front. A wide, dark brown leather strap wraps horizontally around the middle, securing the book closed. The edges of the pages are visible from the sides, showing a light tan color, and the book appears to be well-bound and sturdy. The back cover is plain with only faint gold linework, lacking any illustration or decoration. The spine is simple, with dark panels and no visible text or embellishments. The overall appearance suggests a mystical or ancient tome, possibly used for rituals or as a prop in a fantasy setting.
description: A thick, dark hardbound book with ornate gold designs on the front and a wide brown leather strap securing it closed.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elaborate gold arcane design on the cover, partially obscured by the wide brown strap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the book, the tan page edges, and the leather strap wrapping around the middle.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain dark cover with faint gold linework and the brown strap across the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the book's thickness, the tan page edges, and the strap, with no visible text or decoration.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features an ornate, circular gold design with intricate geometric and arcane motifs, giving it a mystical or magical appearance. The illustration is highly decorative, with symmetrical patterns and a sense of ancient symbolism.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark with rectangular gold accents and no visible text or decorative elements. It has a simple, sturdy appearance.
